case_title: ORTEZ-LUCERO, ROSA VS BORG, MATHEW IND/DBA FRISCO AUTO BODY et al

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BORG, MATHEW IND/DBA FRISCO AUTO BODY BUSTOS, SALVADOR IND/DBA FRISCO AUTO BODY SHOP
OEX O/C; NO POS FILED, NO APPEARANCES.
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ORTEZ-LUCERO, ROSA ASSIGNED TO AARON, MUELLER & SINCLAIR
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JAN-13-2005, OFF CALENDAR AS TO THIRD PARTY BORG, MATHEW
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JAN-13-2005, OFF CALENDAR AS TO THIRD PARTY BUSTOS, SALVADOR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BUSTOS, SALVADOR IND/DBA FRISCO AUTO BODY SHOP

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ORTEZ-LUCERO, ROSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BORG, MATHEW IND/DBA FRISCO AUTO BODY BUSTOS, SALVADOR IND/DBA FRISCO AUTO BODY SHOP $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,580.00, MATHEW BORG IND & DBA FRISCO AUTO BODY IS AMENDED TO BORG, MATHEW IND & DBA FRISCO AUTO BODY. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO AMEND CLAIM TO $5000 IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2001, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT BUSTOS, SALVADOR IND/DBA FRISCO AUTO BODY SHOP
